What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a white lab coat and blue face mask stands behind a white table. Two clear plastic tubs sit in the center, with the left tub containing blue liquid and foam while the right tub holds clear liquid. A purple and silver syringe device rests on the left side near the tubs. Small white bottles and paper towels are positioned on the right side of the table surface.

Describe the visual progression of scenes and equipment setup shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, title logos for Neogen and Prima Tech appear on a green background; at 8s, a person in a lab coat stands behind a table with two tubs; at 10s, blue and clear liquids appear in containers on the table; at 18s, lubricant bottles with text instructions fill the screen.

canonical_answer: The person dips the pipette tip into the container with blue liquid.
